title: Choices Paradox
description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]5[/blue] random cards into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to the chosen card.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Triggers only at the start of Round 1 of combat. Generates 5 random cards from the unlocked card pool and applies Retain to all of them. You select 1 card to add to your hand.
